advisory.title: ASA-2024-006: ValidateVoteExtensions helper function may allow incorrect voting power assumptions
advisory.description: Cosmos SDK advisory ASA-2024-006 covers a missing-validation bug in the default ValidateVoteExtensions helper in baseapp. The helper infers total voting power from VoteExtension data injected by the proposer, allowing a malicious proposer to manipulate validator voting power assumptions in dependent modules. The fix in v0.50.5 (commit 4467110df4 'Merge pull request from GHSA-95rx-m9m5-m94v') validates the ExtendedCommit against the LastCommit so voting power is reconciled against the state machine. Affects v0.50.0–v0.50.4; fixed in v0.50.5.

timeline.notes: vulnerableHead is the v0.50.4 release commit, the last vulnerable v0.50 release before the v0.50.5 patch. The introducing commit is the CometBFT v0.38 integration that brought the ABCI++ ExtendedCommit / VoteExtension flow into baseapp/abci_utils.go, where ValidateVoteExtensions lives.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should flag the missing-validation bug in baseapp/abci_utils.go ValidateVoteExtensions where total voting power is inferred from proposer-provided VoteExtension data without cross-checking against the LastCommit / state machine.

checks.name: advisory_published
checks.details: ASA-2024-006 (GHSA-95rx-m9m5-m94v) was published on 2024-03-12 with the patch in cosmos-sdk v0.50.5; CVSS 7.1 AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:H.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_in_advisory_range
checks.details: vulnerableHead is the v0.50.4 release commit, the latest tag in the >=0.50.0,<=0.50.4 vulnerable range.
